response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software engineer with strong web, mobile, and some embedded background, but the role requires specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep learning workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no evidence of GPU architecture work, SIMD/MIMD experience, DNN training/inference optimization, or chip-level performance analysis. Educational background (BS in CS) meets the years-of-experience threshold, but the technical domain mismatch is severe for a Principal-level hardware-focused IC role.
strengths: 20+ years of professional software engineering experience across diverse stacks
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems work (Dlang microservices handling millions of req/s)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and workshops/teaching
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or chip architecture experience
No demonstrated AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or deep learning workload optimization background
Career focus is web/mobile/full-stack, not performance architecture for AI hardware

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU architecture or DNN optimization experience
